zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Montfort於1205年出生在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特時，他的父親Thurstan de Montfort III21歲，母親Juliana de Cantilupe19歲。他於大約1238年與Amice De Audley在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年60歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Montfort于1205年出生在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特时，他的父亲Thurstan de Montfort III21岁，母亲Juliana de Cantilupe19岁。他于大约1238年与Amice De Audley在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年8月4日在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年60岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Montfort was born in 1205, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thurstan de Montfort III, was 21 and his mother, Juliana de Cantilupe, was 19. He married Amice De Audley about 1238, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Montfort est né en 1205, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thurstan de Montfort III, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Cantilupe, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Amice De Audley environ 1238, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1265, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Montfort 1205 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurstan de Montfort III 21 und seine Mutter Juliana de Cantilupe 19. Er hat um 1238 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England Amice De Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1265 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Evesham, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Evesham, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Montfort è nato il nel 1205 nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Thurstan de Montfort III, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Cantilupe, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Amice De Audley circa 1238, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Montfortが1205年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトで生まれた時，父Thurstan de Montfort IIIは21歳，母Juliana de Cantilupeは19歳であった。約1238年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトでAmice De Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年8月4日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで60歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Montfort(이)가 1205년 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurstan de Montfort III(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Cantilupe(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1238년 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 Amice De Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Montfort nasceu em 1205, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thurstan de Montfort III, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Cantilupe, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Amice De Audley aproximadamente 1238, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1265, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Montfort родился в 1205 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thurstan de Montfort III было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Cantilupe, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Amice De Audley около 1238 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Montfort nació en 1205, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thurstan de Montfort III, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Juliana de Cantilupe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Amice De Audley aproximadamente 1238, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1265, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
